title: Random Drops
description: A datapack of items dropped randomly.
body:
## Random Drops
Drops and loot will now drop completely randomly. Have a good time :P

**From 1.1.0** -> Items and blocks

**1.0.1** -> Only items

![random](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HFL2d2QE/images/3ba151d7e8c49c38f0f51b15c0a6de1195e3e829.png)
